risks.risk: No tasks formally assigned - project not started
risks.mitigation: VEDABOSS must set T-D1-001 and T-M1 to status=assigned immediately

risks.risk: T-D1-001 is the single critical path task - any delay cascades to all agents
risks.mitigation: Assign T-D1-001 first, recommend Claude Code (file system access) for DEV_1

risks.risk: T-D1-001 scope is very large (40-50 files, steps 1-9) - risk of incomplete output

risks.mitigation: Assign T-M2 (UI_UX) early in Wave 2 concurrently with DEV_2

recommendations: IMMEDIATE: Set T-D1-001 status to assigned - only unblocked critical task
IMMEDIATE: Set T-M1 status to assigned - PRODUCT_AI_AGENT can run in parallel with DEV_1
Wave 2 prep: Pre-assign T-M2 to UI_UX_AI_AGENT as soon as DEV_1 is running
Monitoring: Check DEV_1 every 24h - escalate if no output after 48h
